mapper.insert:
SELECT BM_VALIDATION_NOTIFICATION_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BM_VALIDATION_NOTIFICATION ( NOTIFICATION_ID, VALIDATION_TYPE, RULE_ID, RESULT_ID, RESULT_STATUS, TITLE, MESSAGE, RECIPIENTS, READ_YN, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{notificationId}, #{validationType}, #{ruleId}, #{resultId}, #{resultStatus}, #{title}, #{message}, #{recipients}, 'N', SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT NOTIFICATION_ID, VALIDATION_TYPE, RULE_ID, RESULT_ID, RESULT_STATUS, TITLE, MESSAGE, RECIPIENTS, READ_YN, CREATED_AT FROM BM_VALIDATION_NOTIFICATION ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC, NOTIFICATION_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 100 ROWS ONLY
